german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant portion of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Technical Roles Marginalized
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Technical PM roles, highlighting an imbalance in the product management landscape.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: With 57% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: Fragmented Work Modes Indicate Uncertain Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of the workforce remains unclassified, highlighting mixed expectations for remote and on-site arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with limited remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream
ai.subtitle: 41% of roles require AI as a core responsibility, with 39% needing AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
